item.title: EU MiCA fully in force as of July 1; only ~210 of 1,200+ prior VASP-registered firms secured CASP authorization.
DTCC began tokenized stock, ETF and Treasury production trades July 14 with 50+ firms; full platform launch set for October.
SEC added three crypto rulemaking proposals to its July 2026 agenda: token offerings, broker-dealer capital rules, and market structure.
Standard Chartered became the first G-SIB to enable institutional USDC minting and redemption via Circle, launching in Dubai.
CFTC approved cash-settled Bitcoin perpetual futures for listing on registered derivatives exchanges, with initial regulatory guidance.
BIS Annual Report concluded stablecoins structurally resemble ETFs rather than genuine money, as the market reached $320 billion.
FATF reports 85 of 117 jurisdictions have enacted Travel Rule legislation for virtual assets, with EU's TFR now at zero threshold.
SEC published guidance clarifying how federal securities laws apply to crypto assets across issuance, trading and custody.
JPMorgan filed to launch a tokenized fund as Wall Street institutions accelerate programs to place assets on blockchain rails.
DeFi protocol Summer.fi lost approximately $6 million to a July exploit targeting its LazyVault USDC vault.
Chainalysis links 76% of 2026 crypto hack losses to North Korea-linked actors; total DeFi exploits exceeded $840 million through May.
A Bitcoin banking adoption index covering 25 major institutions placed sector-wide adoption at 32%, with Fidelity scoring highest at 71%.
A new nonprofit launched on July 1 focused on accelerating institutional and Wall Street adoption of Ethereum.
